text.div:
Iwi

https://nzhts.digital.health.nz/fhir/ValueSet/iwi-code

New Zealand iwi codes. The 2 digit codes are abstract codes and provided in the expansion for navigational purposes. Users should not select an abstract code directly as a proper value.

name: Iwi
title: Iwi
